Modality: will be retained; exceptions: may be retained for more than seven (7) years in certain circumstances; where further retention is required by law; where there is an obligation under the law to report, disclose or verify details; where the Bank can establish sufficient grounds; where it is in compliance with the Bank’s internal requirements; where regulators require continued maintenance
